title: aster erigeroides var. schultesii
intro: Aster erigeroides var. schultesii, also known as Schultes' fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Aster erigeroides var. schultesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin conditions, and support the immune system. Aster erigeroides var. schultesii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
